recent_no_license_projects.name: fastapi-api-key
recent_no_license_projects.summary: fastapi-api-key provides secure, production-ready API key management for FastAPI. It offers pluggable hashing strategies (Argon2, bcrypt, or custom), backend-agnostic persistence (SQLAlchemy, in-memory, or your own repository), and an optional cache layer (aiocache, Redis). Includes a Typer CLI and a FastAPI router for CRUD management of keys.
